# uid

**Instance Property**

An unsigned integer that represents the user ID of the entry.

## Declaration

```swift
var uid: UInt32? { get set }
```

## Instance Properties

- **btm**: A time specification value that represents the backup time of the entry.
- **ctm**: A time specification value that represents the creation time of the entry.
- **flg**: An unsigned integer that represents the BSD flags of the entry.
- **gid**: An unsigned integer that represents the group ID of the entry.
- **mod**: An unsigned integer that represents the file modes of the entry.
- **mtm**: A time specification value that represents the modification time of the entry.
